query_normalized: multi-property trade-offs in alloy design using public compositional data materials science
rationale: This paper does not satisfy any acceptance criteria (a-f) because it focuses on specific magnetic properties (half-metallicity, Slater-Pauling behavior) in a single alloy class (Heusler alloys) rather than addressing multi-property trade-offs in alloy design using public compositional data. While it shares the broad materials science domain, it lacks the core methodological focus (public compositional data for multi-property optimization) and does not establish baselines or foundational methodol
